title: sports-registry — helper functions
description: Four published helpers for common sport-catalog lookups from any layer (controller, action, listener, blade template, artisan command). Sport keys are NOT a request-scoped context axis (there is no `X-Sport-Id` header), so the helpers accept explicit arguments rather than reading from request state.

helpers.signature: resolve_sport(string $sport_key, ?string $discipline_key = null, ?string $position_key = null, ?string $tenant_id = null): array | null
helpers.purpose: Returns the resolved triple (Sport [, Discipline [, Position]]) OR null when nothing resolves. Delegates to `SportKeyResolver::resolve(...)`. Tenant defaults to the caller's active tenant from RequestContext when omitted.
behaviours: Cheap — resolution is cached at `sports:resolve:{tenant_id}:{sport_key}[:{discipline_key}[:{position_key}]]` for 1 hour.
Tenant customs win over platform-seeded when both match (config-driven per `sports_registry.resolution.prefer_tenant_custom`).
Returns partial resolutions: {sport_key} alone returns the Sport row; adding discipline_key extends the result to (Sport + Discipline); adding position_key returns the full triple.
When any level fails to resolve, returns null (the caller decides whether to throw SPORT_KEY_UNRESOLVED). The bare helper is silent — use `resolve_sport_or_fail()` when a throw is desired.

helpers.purpose: Same as `resolve_sport()` but throws SportKeyUnresolvedException (422) when any level fails to resolve. Used at write time in downstream Wave 3 modules where an unresolved key is a hard failure.
behaviours: Delegates to `resolve_sport()`; when the result is null, throws with the specific unresolved level (SPORT_KEY_UNRESOLVED / DISCIPLINE_KEY_UNRESOLVED / POSITION_KEY_UNRESOLVED).
The thrown exception carries the resolver's search trace for debugging.

helpers.purpose: Returns the Sport's localised display name. Consumes the SportKeyResolver + localization's HasTranslations trait. Locale defaults to the caller's active locale.
behaviours: Falls back to the Sport's canonical English name when the requested locale is not translated.
Returns the slug verbatim as a last resort when the sport_key doesn't resolve — never throws (this is a display-only helper).
Used in email subjects + notification bodies + dashboard chip labels.

helpers.purpose: Returns the merged catalog (platform-seeded + tenant customs) for the given tenant (defaults to the caller's active tenant). Active-only unless overridden.
behaviours: Sorted by category asc, sort_order asc, name asc.
Used by the tenant admin catalog UI + every downstream sport-picker widget.

notes: Every helper here is a thin wrapper. Prefer container-injected services (`SportRepository`, `SportKeyResolver`, `CustomEntryFactory`) for anything more complex — helpers are a convenience for readable one-liners in view + controller code.
No `active_sport()` helper — sports are NOT a request-scoped context. Callers must pass the sport_key explicitly.

examples.title: Validate sport_key on write
examples.code:
$sport = resolve_sport_or_fail($request->sport_key);
// $sport is the resolved Sport model + relations (Discipline + Position if provided)

examples.title: Render sport chip in a template
Populate a select in the tenant admin UI
